Item 1A. Risk Factors

This paragraph has a non-breaking space and a curly’apostrophe inside the text body, both of which `unstructured.partition_html` may normalize.

Nested span elements should still preserve byte offsets back into the raw source.

The next paragraph contains a stray CDATA fragment that should not break parsing:

Item 7. Management Discussion and Analysis

Trailing section content. This is short prose to give the chunker a second section with paragraphs to pack.

A second paragraph ensures the packer has more than one element per section to fold together.
